name: writing
summary: Novel writing workflow assets and dynamic asset library commands

commands.name: asset-lib
commands.summary: Manage and search writing-time dynamic asset sub-libraries

args.name: action
args.summary: init, libs, info, index, search, compose, chapter-context, path, or help

args.name: --root <path>
args.summary: Asset library root. Defaults to writing\asset-libraries.

args.name: --query <text>
args.summary: Rough text query for search or compose. Can be repeated.

args.name: --kind <kind>
args.summary: Filter by kind: planning, worldview, character, faction, outline kinds, state, snapshot, log, inbox, template, or any.

args.name: --stage <stage>
args.summary: Filter by stage/granularity text such as volume, arc, five-chapter, chapter-interval.

args.name: --chapter <n>
args.summary: Match chapter number in path/body, useful for chapter writing context retrieval.

args.name: --from <n> --to <n>
args.summary: Match a chapter range in path/body for interval retrieval.

args.name: --include-content
args.summary: Include content excerpts in search output.

args.name: --out <path>
args.summary: Compose output path. Defaults to the library composed-context directory.
